AnalyticsFromEpochDayQuery.description: Inclusive start epoch day for operations analytics dashboard range.
AnalyticsFromEpochDayQuery.name: fromEpochDay

AnalyticsToEpochDayQuery.description: Inclusive end epoch day for operations analytics dashboard range.
AnalyticsToEpochDayQuery.name: toEpochDay

DeliveryDateQuery.description: Target delivery date in Asia/Taipei for fulfillment board and export snapshots.
DeliveryDateQuery.name: deliveryDate

IncludeAuditTransitionsQuery.description: When false, omits status transition audit entries from fulfillment board payload.
IncludeAuditTransitionsQuery.name: includeAuditTransitions

MenuDateQuery.description: Anchor date for week/calendar discovery windows in Asia/Taipei.
MenuDateQuery.name: menuDate

RemainingQuantityFilterQuery.description: Exact inventory counter filter. Matches only items whose remaining quantity equals this value.
RemainingQuantityFilterQuery.name: remainingQuantity

ServiceWindowActiveAtQuery.description: Evaluate mappings active at this fixed Asia/Taipei business timestamp.
ServiceWindowActiveAtQuery.name: activeAt

BadRequest.description: Request payload or query is invalid.

Forbidden.description: Authenticated actor is not authorized to perform this operation.

InternalServerError.description: Internal server error while processing request.

Unauthorized.description: Authentication token is missing or invalid.

ValidationFailed.description: Request is syntactically valid but violates business validation rules.

EmployeeOrderPatchRequest.description: Order patch command. Supports line-item replacement and cancellation under the same cutoff governance.

args.description: Tool arguments encoded as JSON. Shape depends on the selected MCP tool.

amountCiphertext.description: AES-GCM encrypted serialized money payload envelope (`v1:nonce:ciphertext`).

employeeActorCiphertext.description: AES-GCM encrypted employee actor identifier envelope (`v1:nonce:ciphertext`) for payroll privacy controls.

orderIdCiphertext.description: AES-GCM encrypted order identifier envelope (`v1:nonce:ciphertext`) for payroll privacy controls.

verificationCode.description: Current TOTP QR payload bound to orderId and Asia/Taipei 30-second step boundary.
Single-use pickup TOTP QR payload bound to orderId and fixed Asia/Taipei 30-second step boundaries.

SpecialRequestOption.description: Controlled special-request options. Free-text instructions are intentionally disabled pending final policy clarification.

TaipeiBusinessDateTime.description: Fixed Asia/Taipei business timestamp. Always serialize with +08:00 offset.

modifyCancelCutoffMinuteOfDayOverride.description: Optional vendor override minute-of-day (Asia/Taipei) for previous-day modify/cancel cutoff.

preorderOpenDaysAheadOverride.description: Optional vendor override for how many days ahead preorder stays open.

mcpOAuthServiceAccountBearer.description: OAuth service-account bearer token for MCP tool and resource access.

vendorMfaBearer.description: Vendor account token issued only after MFA challenge.
